---
title: "Links"
listing:
  template: links.ejs
  contents:
    - title: SMARTbiomed AI Upskilling Workshop
      ppath: https://sachsmc.github.io/pages/SBM-AI-Skills/SMARTbiomed_AI_upskilling_DRAFT.html
      description: Blah
    - title: Causal Considerations in Developing and Evaluating Risk Prediction Models
      ppath: https://sachsmc.github.io/pages/sachs_causal_prediction.pdf
      description: SMARTbiomed Workshop -- 2024 October 28
    - title: Introduction to causaloptim
      ppath: https://sachsmc.github.io/pages/causaloptim_presentation.pdf
      description: Talk at Weisbaden R Users Group, 2024 September 3
---
